name: Nozzle.io
highlight_text: Best for tracking ranks for different brand properties
description:
What Nozzle.io Does

Nozzle.io is a rank tracking platform that helps local businesses monitor their search visibility at a hyper-local level across specific geographic areas, neighborhoods, cities, zip codes, etc. The core focus is on tracking performance in localized search results tailored to the audiences you target. They have some unique tracking features as well, that may make up for the not-so-decent UI of the platform.
‍

Source: Nozzle

Key Features

  • Monitor rankings in localized search results for any area  
  • Target tracking by state, city, zip code, neighborhood, etc.
  • Track full SERP data including organic results and map packs
  • Connect your Google Business Profile for local pack visibility
  • Understand your holistic local search presence
  • Track rankings of local competitors across the same areas
  • Identify who is outranking you in which local markets
  • Gain critical competitive intelligence for localized SEO
  • Choose data update cadences tailored to each location
  • Define any recurrence frequency needed (daily/weekly/etc.)
  • Flexible schedules to align with your local priorities
  • SERP Snapshot tool to visualize SERP changes over time  
  • Compare current view to historical local ranking shifts
  • Identify new SERP threats or opportunities emerging

Benefits of Nozzle

  • Hyper-local visibility into rankings tailored to your markets
  • Full SERP monitoring including maps/local pack performance  
  • Competitive intelligence focused on your local landscape 
  • Customizable tracking schedules aligned to your local priorities  
  • Historical tracking of SERP shifts impacting your visibility

Pricing

$49

Pros

✅SERP snapshot feature is a great feature that visualizes exactly how your target SERP looks over time

✅Tracks brand properties (including social and GMB), not just website

Cons

❌Reporting/visualization could be better

❌The interface can get confusing due to vast amount of data, impacting the user experience.

‍
